agents.name: Coordinator
agents.role: Monitor tasks, handoffs, status, and summarize progress for the human
agents.device: Always-on Mac mini or small server

agents.name: Planner
agents.role: Plan work, write documents, design workflows, review outputs

agents.name: Producer
agents.role: Run GPU jobs, local models, ComfyUI, rendering, media generation

agents.name: Researcher
agents.role: Collect sources, scrape data, summarize references, prepare research notes

limits: Do not delete shared folder data automatically
Do not use deletion-propagating sync by default
Do not publish externally without human review
Do not overwrite governance files automatically
